hero.headline: Hi, I'm Aniket!
hero.tagline: I make complex things feel simple.
hero.bio: I've spent 13 years at the intersection of engineering and design — seeing systems and people at the same time. Right now I'm leading Dell's unified AI strategy for authenticated experiences — connecting the dots across domains where most people only see their own corner. I sit at the edge of design and program leadership, building the agentic systems that will define how enterprise AI actually gets used.
